Description: Median annual gross earnings for full-time employees in Great Britain, in GBP (£). Source: ONS ASHE survey.
HMRC estimate of the total UK tax gap for the year, in billions of GBP (£bn). The tax gap is the difference between tax owed and tax collected.
Year-on-year percentage change in median annual earnings. Calculated as: ((current year − previous year) / previous year) × 100. NaN for the first year.
Year-on-year percentage change in the total tax gap. Calculated as: ((current year − previous year) / previous year) × 100. NaN for the first year.
